addi.views.container.title: Addi
addi.views.providers.name: Providers
addi.views.welcome.contents:
Welcome to Addi!

Get started by adding your first AI provider. Or first check [Docs](https://github.com/deepwn/addi)

[Add Provider](command:addi.addProvider)

[Import Config](command:addi.importConfig)
addi.configuration.title: Addi Settings
addi.configuration.confirmDelete.desc: Whether to require confirmation before deleting providers or models
addi.configuration.sortRule.desc: Sort rule for providers and models
addi.configuration.sortTarget.desc: Target to apply the sort rule
addi.configuration.syncConfiguration.des: Enable to sync provider configuration (excluding API keys) across devices via VS Code settings sync. API keys are stored locally in VS Code SecretStorage and are not synced.
